name: 𝐊𝐀𝐑𝐌𝐄𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐀 --- SKARRSINGER KARMELITA
description:
"The Queen of Hunter's March herself, the Head of the Skarr Ant tribe, the ruler of her people. The voice of a goddess whose blade moves flawless and precise."

With Grace, swift and confident, her strikes shall always ring true, for none could rival nor compare to her mortal prowess
